creator: prentice.plucker@lodgenet.com
text:
The BTX loader hangs at bootup displaying nothing but the minus sign
when I have the configured raid volume drives pluged into the raid
controller. I am trying to boot from a SATA drive that is plugged into
the motherboard and shows up as ad6. If I remove the drives from the
3ware controller boot works normally.

I installed an OS drive with BSD 6.4 loaded on it and the system booted
up just fine with the raid drives installed.

Fix: 

Have not found one yet
